page: Microsoft Azure E8-4ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the EADSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7763 processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The server is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16.0 GB per core. It also includes 307 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage.

Benchmark results indicate a divergence between single-core and multi-core performance. The AMD EPYC processor delivers strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng tests, placing in the top 25%. However, multi-core CPU performance and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression fall into the bottom 25%, reflecting the lower physical core count. Memory performance is mixed, with large-block read-only bandwidth and PassMark memory scores registering in the average range, while small-block read bandwidth and large-block write bandwidth remain in the bottom 25%.

Given its high memory density relative to compute resources, the E8-4ads_v5 is designed for memory-intensive workloads that do not require massive parallel processing power. It is suitable for relational databases, caching layers, and memory-bound data processing tasks. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers a high volume of RAM and local storage per vCPU, making it a viable option for workloads where memory capacity, rather than raw multi-threaded compute, is the primary bottleneck.
description: Microsoft Azure E8-4ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the EADSv5 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs (2 physical cores) running at 3.525 GHz. It features 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16.0 GB per core, alongside 307 GB of local storage. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities, though multi-core and memory write bandwidth metrics generally fall into the lower percentiles. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive applications, such as databases and caching systems, that require substantial memory capacity but do not demand heavy parallel compute resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E8-4ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and 307 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high memory density and local storage for memory-bound database and caching workloads.
